title.en: Fifa opens investigation into Argentina post-final trouble - what happens next?
title.zh-CN: 国际足联开始调查阿根廷决赛后的问题-接下来会发生什么？

summary.en: Argentina will face an investigation into the ugly scenes at the end of the World Cup final, Fifa has confirmed.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联证实，阿根廷将在世界杯决赛结束时面临对丑陋场面的调查。

title.en: Messi says 'pain is immense' after losing World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 梅西在输掉世界杯决赛后表示“痛苦是巨大的”

summary.en: Lionel Messi says "the pain is immense" and that it "will take time to heal" after Argentina lost 1-0 to Spain in the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）表示， “痛苦是巨大的” ，在阿根廷在世界杯决赛中以1比0输给西班牙后， “需要时间来治愈”。

title.en: Gallery: Spain celebrate World Cup triumph in Madrid
title.zh-CN: 画廊：西班牙在马德里庆祝世界杯的胜利

summary.en: Thousands of fans take to the streets of Madrid as the Spain squad enjoy a bus parade after winning the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 成千上万的球迷走上马德里的街头，西班牙队在赢得世界杯后享受巴士游行。

title.en: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
title.zh-CN: 纽卡斯尔、利物浦和英格兰传奇人物基根去世

summary.en: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长和经理凯文·基根（ Kevin Keegan ）在透露他被诊断出患有四期癌症七周后去世，享年75岁。

title.en: Keegan's double inspires Liverpool to 1974 FA Cup glory
title.zh-CN: Keegan的双重激励让利物浦获得1974年足总杯的荣耀

summary.en: Kevin Keegan scores twice as Liverpool defeat Newcastle United 3-0 in the 1974 FA Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 凯文·基根（ Kevin Keegan ）在1974年足总杯决赛中两次以3-0击败利物浦击败纽卡斯尔联队。

title.en: Watch the BBC's closing World Cup montage
title.zh-CN: 观看英国广播公司世界杯闭幕式蒙太奇

summary.en: Watch the closing montage of the BBC's coverage of the 2026 Fifa World Cup featuring all the highs, lows and colour from the biggest World Cup ever.
summary.zh-CN: 观看英国广播公司对2026年国际足联世界杯的报道的最后剪辑，其中包括有史以来最大的世界杯的所有高潮、低谷和色彩。

title.en: Stay or go - at 28, Rashford faces big Man Utd call
title.zh-CN: 留下或离开-在28岁时，拉什福德面临着曼联的重大呼唤

summary.en: The World Cup is over, and Marcus Rashford returns home not knowing if his future at club level lies with Manchester United.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯已经结束，马库斯·拉什福德（ Marcus Rashford ）回到家中，不知道他在俱乐部层面的未来是否在曼联。

title.en: Chelsea sign Man Utd striker Malard for £850,000
title.zh-CN: 切尔西以£ 850,000的价格签下曼联前锋马拉德

summary.en: France forward Melvine Malard links up again with Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor, who gave her her debut at Lyon.
summary.zh-CN: 法国前锋Melvine Malard再次与切尔西经理Sonia Bompastor联系，后者让她在里昂首次亮相。

title.en: Lamine Yamal 'completes football' at 19 as Argentina betray Messi
title.zh-CN: Lamine Yamal在19岁时“完成足球” ，因为阿根廷背叛了梅西

summary.en: Spain's Lamine Yamal takes the glory of World Cup victory as the great Lionel Messi's evening ends in tears.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙的拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）以世界杯的胜利为荣，伟大的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）的夜晚以泪水

title.en: World Cup final watched by 15.8m people on BBC
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司1580万人观看的世界杯决赛

summary.en: Spain's victory in Sunday's World Cup final attracts a peak audience of 15.8 million on BBC One and BBC iPlayer.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙在周日世界杯决赛中的胜利在BBC One和BBC iPlayer上吸引了1580万的高峰观众。

title.en: 'The reaction is terrible' - World Cup final turns ugly at full-time
title.zh-CN: “反应很糟糕” -世界杯决赛全职变得丑陋

summary.en: The frustration of some Argentina players boils over at the end of the 2026 World Cup final, after the 2022 winners are beaten by Spain in extra time.
summary.zh-CN: 在2022年获胜者在加时赛中被西班牙击败后，一些阿根廷球员的沮丧情绪在2026年世界杯决赛结束时沸腾了。

title.en: Mbappe wins race for the 2026 World Cup golden boot
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩赢得2026年世界杯金靴赛冠军

summary.en: All the goals from the race for the 2026 World Cup golden boot as Kylian Mbappe leads the way from Lionel Messi, Jude Bellingham and Erling Haaland.
summary.zh-CN: Kylian Mbappe在莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）、裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）和埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）的带领下， 2026年世界杯金靴赛的所有

title.en: Manager Garcia to leave Belgium when contract expires
title.zh-CN: Garcia经理将在合同到期后离开比利时

summary.en: Belgium manager Rudi Garcia will leave his role after the country's football association decided against extending his contract.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时主教练鲁迪·加西亚（ Rudi Garcia ）将在该国足球协会决定不延长合同后辞职。

title.en: Sixteen titles in five years - why Spain are a dominant force
title.zh-CN: 五年内获得16个冠军头衔-为什么西班牙是主导力量

summary.en: We look at what's behind Spain's dominance after they become the first nation to be men's and women's World Cup champions at the same time.
summary.zh-CN: 在西班牙成为第一个同时成为男子和女子世界杯冠军的国家后，我们来看看西班牙统治地位的背后是什么。

title.en: Podcast: World Cup lessons & Celtic's transfer standstill
title.zh-CN: 播客：世界杯课程和凯尔特人的转会停滞

summary.en: What has the World Cup changed - and why are Celtic fans losing patience?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯发生了什么变化？为什么凯尔特球迷会失去耐心？

title.en: Everton sign defender Blundell on permament deal

summary.en: Hannah Blundell, who has won three England caps, says it was an "easy decision" to make her Everton move permanent after leaving Manchester United.

title.en: Former England forward and manager Keegan dies aged 75

summary.en: Kevin Keegan has died at the age of 75.

title.en: A tribute to Kevin Keegan | 1951-2026

summary.en: Sky Sports takes a look back at the incredible career of former England manager and legendary footballer Kevin Keegan, who has died at the age of 75.

title.en: The trends that defined the World Cup

summary.en: The biggest World Cup in history produced numbers to match. Forty-eight teams, 104 games and three host countries delivered a record 308 goals before Spain were crowned champions.

title.en: How has the World Cup impacted the Ballon d'Or race?

summary.en: The biggest individual prize in football has many variables. Often the Ballon d'Or race is dictated by those players who have spearheaded their club sides, or national teams, to trophies.
